name: Fourth Wing RPG
description:
Hiii!! As can probably be seen from the image I am trying something new. I've done a lot of anime bots and even a couple of my own original (or inspired) plots. But when I was searching for ideas I realised I can do a book. So yea, this is a bot where you are in the world of the Empyrean with dragons and riders and all of that shabang!

For this one I haven't really set anything up for a scenario, it's gonna be a lot like my other RPG bots where you can choose any path. Though if I do get any ideas or see this getting popular I might do a specific one (or I might to Iron Flame or even Onyx Storm which would need scenarios). Either way that's how this one is gonna go.

As usual if you have feedback, requests or just wanna chat I'd love a comment. I'm also always looking for recommendations so if you think I might like something it would be awesome if you put it in.

Have fun!!!
creator: dogie2010
